description: Bifolio of commercial accounts, probably from a wider ledger. 16th- or 17th-century based on the paleography and layout. Some of the names of those mentioned include Ottoman elite titles: "Qapetan (Captain) Sinān Bey" and "Farḥat al-Wazīr." Requires further examination. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
